_comment_: pokeapi wiring demo: reducer resolves before format dispatch; base_stat_total=0 for every row by design (shallow list has no per-Pokemon stats). inc_code is 'name', not 'id' -- the shallow list has no id field, and 'id' would silently PK by auto-counter position instead. Run from this directory: incorporator validate pipeline.json && incorporator stream pipeline.json
